katas.title: Choose a Hosting Strategy
katas.prompt: A 3-person startup is launching a web app. Expected traffic: 1,000 users/day initially, goal of 100,000 in 12 months. Budget: minimal. Team has no dedicated ops. Recommend a hosting strategy with a growth path.
criteria: Has a growth path to handle 100x traffic
Does not over-engineer for day-one needs
